questions.objective_ref: LO1 — Explain what an algorithm is in plain language, without using programming jargon
LO2 — Describe the key characteristics that distinguish an algorithm from an arbitrary list of steps
LO3 — Apply the idea of algorithmic thinking to a familiar everyday task
LO4 — Identify, by inspection, whether a given set of steps qualifies as an algorithm or falls short
LO5 — Explain why clear, unambiguous instructions matter when writing steps for a computer to follow
